calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 Phase 1 gated-policy substrate-readiness diagnostic
items.note: Phase 1 of arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md (GAP-A). Substrate-readiness diagnostic for the new ree_core/policy/gated_policy.py module (GatedPolicy + GatedPolicyConfig + GatedPolicyOutput) and its REEConfig + REEAgent wiring. Five sub-tests: UC1 forward-pass instantiation; UC2 master-OFF no-op vs baseline E3; UC3 discriminator output varies with z_world (input sensitivity, threshold 0.001 -- Phase-1 init regime, substantial variation is a Phase-2 training signal); UC4 head differentiation under training pressure (>5x output divergence on held-out batch after 200 SGD steps); UC5 MECH-094 simulation_mode gate. Pull A SYNTHESIS verdicts (R1 multi-stream / R2 N=2 / R3 score_bias level) are architectural commitments, not signals tested here -- those are Phase 2 work. PASS gates the Phase 1 substrate-landing close-out (plan-doc GAP-A status open -> done) and unblocks Phase 2 monomodal-collapse falsifier on SD-054 reef substrate.
